description: The crop family a plant type is a member of, recorded on the plant_type term as a single-valued reference to a crop_family term.
probe_semantics: Deliver the NAME of the crop_family term the subject plant_type TERM references (its single-valued crop_family reference), or the empty value when none was recorded.

given: a plant_type term whose crop_family is the family named Solanaceae
a second plant_type term whose crop_family is the family named Brassicaceae
a third plant_type term with no crop_family
then: crop_family of the first term == Solanaceae
crop_family of the second term == Brassicaceae
crop_family of the third term == the empty value

punts: kind='assertion' guessed deterministically from gap_kind='bundle_field'; field declared in a config YAML on the plant_type vocabulary term, not a log bundle

SHAPE DEVIATION from the propose-terms sketch: the proposal read the subject as 'a land asset' set via 'record_log with crop_family set' (the log-record shape the proposer defaults to) and delivered 'the crop-family value'. Corrected: the subject is a plant_type TERM (subject_kind=entity) created via the new plant_type `given` write surface (MetaCoding plant-type); the value is the referenced crop_family term's NAME (a reproducible string), read off the term's single-valued crop_family reference — a raw per-run taxonomy term UUID could never reproduce across runs or ports and so could never score. The material_type_recorded/laboratory name-readback house form.

SHAPE DEVIATION (cardinality): the reference is SINGLE-valued, so the value is a scalar name, not a list — VALIDATED LIVE (oracle taxonomy_term/plant_type, MetaCoding plant-type): the crop_family relationship delivered as one object (data is a single {type,id}, not an array); an unset crop_family delivered data:null, read back as the empty value "" (the laboratory house form).

REFERENCE ENSURE: the field's own auto_create is false, so the referenced crop_family term must exist. The adapter ensures it by NAME (_ensure_term find-or-create, the unit/lab form) at term-creation time and references it by id — the fixture never carries a per-run UUID.

STANDING-POLICY DECISION (BIND-WITH-FEATURE): treated as BIND-WITH-FEATURE(plant_type) under Duke's standing policy 'identity terms bind DURING their feature's port' (term-dispositions-2026-07-22.md) without a fresh per-term elicitation. Reversal condition: Duke may re-disposition at the next wave boundary; an unbound or retired term costs only its spec.
proposed by openai:gpt-5.6-terra (propose-terms); PROVISIONAL until first_pack_seal is filled by a real sealed recording
